crime.value: Murder of best friend witnessed by narrator
crime.quote: I saw the whole thing how my best friend was killed.

victim.value: Narrator's best friend, reason for targeting unknown
victim.quote: I saw the whole thing how my best friend was killed.

investigator.value: Laura, the narrator who witnessed the murder
investigator.quote: I woke up with the sun's ray touching my skin and tears streaming down my cheeks.

red_herring.value: Dream sequence misdirection - elaborate nightmare parallels reality, suggesting supernatural elements when story is psychological
red_herring.quote: I knew it! Everything was just a dream. A very bad dream.

clue_fairness.value: Missing phone contacts reveal memory manipulation - reader sees same evidence as protagonist about deleted numbers
clue_fairness.quote: Sherri's number is not on my contacts and only my boyfriend's number, my number, my dad's number, my mom's number

social_world.value: Parent-child power dynamic - adult protagonist still subject to parental control despite claiming independence
social_world.quote: I am already 18 years old. I can decide for myself! But still, I have so much respect for my parents.

reveal_mechanic.value: Memory gaps and medication suggest unreliable narrator - protagonist cannot remember how she arrived in Oregon
reveal_mechanic.quote: I do not even remember how I got here from New York.

investigator_wound.value: Protagonist suffers from nightmares and memory loss, making her unreliable witness to her own experience
investigator_wound.quote: You need to take this medicine. To lessen your nightmares

_meta.title: ebook enzo a almario it 039 s not me
